menu.cookies_text: Liquimixer website does not collect any cookies. This application does not use tracking cookies, analytics cookies or third-party cookies. Your privacy is our priority.
menu.gdpr_text: Personal data is stored exclusively for internal use of the Liquimixer website for the purpose of user login to the application. Your data is not shared with third parties or used for marketing purposes. You have the right to request deletion of your data at any time by contacting the Liquimixer website.

home.title: LIQUIMIXER
home.subtitle: E-LIQUID CALCULATOR
home.warning_text: When mixing e-liquid, always wear protective gloves and work in a well-ventilated area, especially if you are using nicotine boosters. Use only quality ingredients without impurities and with food-grade certification suitable for vaping from verified suppliers. Follow precise ingredient ratios. Store finished liquid out of reach of children and pets.
prep.pg_detail: Propylene glycol is a colorless, odorless liquid that forms the base of e-liquids. It ensures flavor transfer and creates the characteristic "throat hit" (throat sensation). It is hygroscopic, so store it in a closed container. PG is generally considered safe for inhalation and is also used in food and pharmaceuticals.
prep.vg_detail: Vegetable glycerin is a thick, sweet liquid obtained from vegetable oils. It is responsible for creating thick vapor and gives the liquid a subtle sweetness. The higher the VG ratio, the thicker the vapor, but less pronounced flavor. VG is suitable for direct lung (DL) and high-performance vaping devices.
prep.flavor_detail: E-liquid flavors are concentrated aromas specifically designed for vaping. Use only flavors intended for e-liquids, not food aromas! Concentrations typically range from 5-20% depending on flavor type. Fruit flavors are more intense, dessert and tobacco flavors require higher percentages and longer steeping.
prep.nicotine_detail:
Nicotine booster: Traditional form of nicotine with a more pronounced throat hit. Suitable for regular vaping.

Nicotine salt: Gentler form of nicotine that is absorbed faster and has a weaker throat hit even at higher concentrations. Suitable for pod systems and MTL devices. WARNING: Nicotine is poison! Always use gloves and work in a well-ventilated area.
prep.gloves_detail: Nitrile or latex gloves are essential when working with nicotine. Nicotine is easily absorbed through the skin and can cause poisoning. Gloves also protect against mixture contamination and maintain sterility. Use disposable gloves and dispose of them safely after work. If skin is contaminated with nicotine, wash thoroughly with soap and water.
prep.bottle_detail: Glass bottles are ideal for storing e-liquids because they do not react with the contents and do not affect flavor. Dark glass (amber) protects against UV radiation and extends shelf life. Bottles with droppers or narrow necks are suitable for mixing. Always thoroughly clean and dry bottles before use.
prep.dropper_detail: Measuring tools are essential for precise dosing of ingredients. Dropper: Suitable for smaller volumes, less precise. Pipette: More precise than dropper, suitable for medium volumes. Syringe (without needle): Most precise option, ideal for nicotine. Use separate tools for each ingredient to avoid contamination.
prep.measuring_detail: You need reliable measuring tools for precise mixing. Graduated cylinders: For measuring volume in ml. Measuring syringes: Various sizes for different ingredients (1ml for nicotine, 5-10ml for VG/PG). Always measure twice and mix once!

flavor.menthol_note: Very concentrated, at 10% cools or burns
flavor.dessert_note: Complex: 2â€“4 weeks steeping, risk of overflavoring
ratio.desc_0_9: Maximum vapor, no flavor or scratchiness. Designed for high-power devices >80W, otherwise coil clogs.
ratio.desc_10_29: Maximum vapor, minimal flavor without scratchiness. Thick liquid for cloud vaping. Designed for high-power devices >80W, otherwise coil clogs.
ratio.desc_30_34: Pronounced vapor, weakening or spoiled flavor. Still thick liquid.
ratio.desc_35_40: Noticeable increase in vapor, flavor remains carrying. Balanced liquid with emphasis on vapor.
ratio.desc_41_55: Balanced ratio of vapor and flavor, suitable for most devices.
ratio.desc_56_60: Gentle scratchiness, carrying flavor, weaker vapor. Suitable for MTL devices.
ratio.desc_61_70: More pronounced scratchiness, pronounced flavor. For experienced vapers.
ratio.desc_71_90: Throat irritation and scratchiness for dry air, pronounced flavor. Designed only for special DTL devices with higher coil resistance.
ratio.desc_91_100: Throat irritation and scratchiness for dry air, maximum flavor and nicotine. No vapor. Designed only for special DTL devices with higher resistance.
nicotine.desc_0: No nicotine - suitable for non-smokers or gradual cessation.
nicotine.desc_1_3: Very weak nicotine - for occasional vapers and final stages of cessation.
nicotine.desc_4_6: Weak nicotine - for light smokers (up to 10 cigarettes per day).
nicotine.desc_7_11: Medium nicotine - for moderate smokers (10-20 cigarettes per day).
nicotine.desc_12_20: For heavy smokers, strong cigarettes, without previous experience nausea threatens.
nicotine.desc_21_35: High nicotine - only for very heavy smokers or pod systems. Nicotine salt recommended.
nicotine.desc_36_45: Extremely strong - only for pod systems with nicotine salt. Overdose danger!
